title: Stewy Rhubarb Crisp
description: A sweet and savory dessert made with rhubarb and topped with a crunchy glassy crust. Perfect for springtime.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the rhubarb, sugar, and jelly. Mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x9 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, combine the flour, Irish cream, and salt. Mix well.
Add the glassy to the flour mixture and mix until a crumbly texture forms.
Add the butter to the flour mixture and mix until a crumbly texture forms.
Top the rhubarb mixture with the flour mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown.
Serve warm, topped with stew if desired.
